unit.name: Text-to-video diffusion and distillation
unit.description: Extends latent diffusion to video, explains scaling bottlenecks, and introduces distillation for faster sampling.
unit.summary: Text-to-video diffusion keeps the same broad latent diffusion pipeline as text-to-image, but the latent tensor gains a temporal dimension in addition to height and width [ts=3530s], [ts=3544s]. The decoder becomes a spatial-temporal autoencoder that upsamples latents into video pixels [ts=3555s]. The major bottleneck is sequence length: high-resolution, high-FPS, many-frame video produces far more tokens than images [ts=3580s]. The lecture contrasts roughly 1,024 image tokens in a state-of-the-art text-to-image model with about 76,000 video tokens in the discussed text-to-video example [ts=3592s], [ts=3609s]. It frames 2024-2025 as a rapid era of video diffusion models, with Sora cited as an influential scaling moment for video diffusion transformers [ts=3623s], [ts=3661s]. The instructor also mentions very recent video generation examples that jointly model audio with video [ts=3703s], [ts=3730s]. The segment ends with diffusion distillation: because sampling may require 30-50 or more model evaluations, distillation attempts to reduce inference steps while preserving sample quality, sometimes even reaching single-step sampling at a quality cost [ts=3750s], [ts=3783s].

key_points.text: Text-to-video diffusion adds a temporal dimension to the latent tensor.
Video decoders are spatial-temporal autoencoders that upsample latent videos into pixels.
Video diffusion is expensive because high-resolution, high-frame-rate video creates very long token sequences.
The example contrasts about 1,024 image tokens with about 76,000 video tokens.
Sora is described as a major scaling moment for video diffusion transformers.
Diffusion sampling is slow because it requires many iterative model evaluations.
Distillation reduces the number of inference steps while trying to preserve sample quality.
Some distillation methods reach single-step sampling but usually trade off generation quality.

kp_catalog.name: Text-to-video diffusion scaling
kp_catalog.description: Text-to-video extends latent diffusion to temporal latents, creating very long sequences and high computational cost.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because text-to-video diffusion scaling clarifies text-to-video extends latent diffusion to temporal latents, creating very long sequences and high computational cost, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.

kp_catalog.name: Diffusion distillation
kp_catalog.description: Distillation reduces iterative sampling steps while trying to preserve sample quality.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because diffusion distillation extends the core thread to distillation reduces iterative sampling steps while trying to preserve sample quality without being required for the main pipeline.
